landing.hero_subtitle: 40+ Years of Industrial Sourcing & Digital Mastery
landing.hero_desc: AnaMine Comercio e Servicos LDA combines advanced supply chain logistics with cutting-edge digital transformation under the Kaizen and Lean Six Sigma philosophy, bridging Angola and Turkey.

company.who_desc: A dynamic dual-sector company bridging Turkish industrial manufacturing expertise with modern digital intelligence systems in Angola. We are your trusted partner in revolutionizing the mining industry, combining cutting-edge digital transformation services with comprehensive consumables supply.
company.what_desc: We secure heavy mining consumables, chemical reagents, and fleet spare parts from direct manufacturing hubs, while building predictive AI software, e-sourcing portals, and secure blockchain tracing systems.
company.where_desc: Headquartered in Condominio Belas Business Park, Talatona, Luanda (Angola) with global sourcing hubs, trade offices, and software engineering labs in Bahçeşehir, Istanbul (Turkey).

global.title: Our Global Footprint
global.luanda_desc: Talatona Business District operations center. Secures mineral trade channels, raw mining chemicals, heavy conveyor networks, and localized sales and distribution across African markets.
global.istanbul_desc: Bahçeşehir high-tech hub. Sources premium machinery spare parts from Turkey's leading manufacturers while developing custom AI models, supply chain SaaS, and blockchain integrations.

sourcing.title: AnaMine Sourcing
sourcing.desc: Heavy industrial supply, mining consumables, MRO spare parts, and global trade operations connecting Angola and Turkey.

home.hero_title: Global Industrial Sourcing & Supply Chain Solutions
home.hero_desc: AnaMine Comercio e Serviços LDA secures raw minerals, chemical agents, steel-reinforced conveyor networks, and specialized heavy MRO spares for mining operators across Africa.
home.pipeline_desc: We eliminate intermediaries by auditing manufacturers on-site in Turkey and executing rapid, customs-cleared maritime routes straight to mining depots in Angola.
home.step1_desc: Direct procurement of wear parts and heavy consumables from Turkey's high-tech manufacturing corridors (Istanbul & Izmir).
home.step2_desc: Systematic pre-shipment quality audits at factories to verify OEM compliance and material structural durability.
home.step3_desc: Streamlined logistics booking via major routes (MSC, Kuehne+Nagel) ensuring continuous transit tracking and compliance.
home.step4_desc: Prompt customs clearing in Luanda, followed by Kaizen inventory distribution from our Talatona logistics hub.
home.oem_desc: We supply technical MRO consumables fully compatible with international mining fleets. Every item arrives with certified material warranties and serial catalog tracking.
home.cap1_desc: Direct supply of wear-resistant crusher plates, steel-reinforced conveyor rubbers, grinding media, flotation frothers, and specialized chemical extractors for diamond and ore extraction.
home.cap2_desc: Automotive components, engine parts, high-pressure seals, planetary gears, and heavy hydraulic valves sourced directly from Turkey's leading manufacturers for Angolan machinery fleets.
home.cap3_desc: Bulk mechanical procurement, pipe fittings, heavy-duty industrial valves, pressure vessels, and refinery maintenance compounds built under ISO 9001 quality compliance.
home.lean_desc: We optimize logistics networks using Lean Six Sigma principles. By auditing database levels, automating warehouse restocking points, and aligning transport lead times, we significantly mitigate production stockouts.

about.title: About AnaMine Sourcing
about.intro: AnaMine Sourcing is a premier supply chain and logistics partner for raw materials, machinery consumables, and chemicals, leveraging Turkey's massive industrial manufacturing ecosystem for Angola's heavy operations.
about.pillar1_desc: Direct access to high-precision automotive, energy, and steel spare parts manufacturers, bypassing intermediary markup.
about.pillar2_desc: Applying systematic optimization protocols to slash supply chains bottlenecking, decrease warehousing costs, and guarantee near-zero downtime.
about.pillar3_desc: Strict environmental guidelines and a rigid code of conduct ensure our minerals and chemical supplies are fully certified and ethically sourced.
about.heritage_desc: With over four decades of deep manufacturing roots in Turkey, we connect the heavy industrial hubs of Istanbul, Bursa, and Izmir to mining fields in Angola. We perform extensive on-site manufacturer audits and secure long-term trade relations with leading steel-reinforced conveyor rubber producers, alloy smelters, and chemical chemical-agent laboratories.
about.sixsigma_desc: We apply the rigorous Lean Six Sigma DMAIC (Define, Measure, Analyze, Improve, Control) cycle to resolve port bottlenecks and custom clearance pipelines. By analyzing transit bottlenecks at Luanda port, we optimize shipping schedules, leading to a massive 18% turnaround reduction.
about.conduct_desc: Operating with integrity means ensuring every kilogram of manganese ore, every industrial conveyor roll, and every mining reagent is sourced under strict compliance guidelines, protecting labor conditions, securing data privacy, and respecting regional communities.

products.title: Minerals & Consumables Catalog
products.intro: We secure high-grade industrial commodities, chemical agents, and wear-resistant parts engineered to withstand the harshest extraction environments.
products.cat_minerals_desc: Strategic supply of high-grade Ferro Alloys, manganese ores, and specialized metallurgical compounds for steel-manufacturing industries.
products.cat_chemicals_desc: Certified extraction reagents, active flotation agents, and standard industrial chemical compounds delivered under maximum safety oversight.
products.cat_consumables_desc: Extreme-durability steel-reinforced conveyor belts, custom drill bits, high-performance wear plates, and precision mechanical spares.
products.cat_drilling_desc: Bespoke high-hardness carbide drill rods, rotary tricone bits, and down-the-hole (DTH) hammers forged for Angola's granite and mineral extraction.
products.cat_mro_desc: Maintenance, Repair, and Operations products including heavy-duty lubricants, high-pressure seals, and primary power transmission spares.
products.cat_ventilation_desc: Flame-retardant flexible underground ventilation ducting and high-capacity centrifugal extraction fans built for extreme underground drafts.

news.title: Sourcing Market News
news.intro: Get the latest insights on global shipping channels, heavy equipment innovations, and new mineral corridors.
news.n1_title: Exciting News in Conveyor Belts Sourcing for Angola Mines!
news.n1_desc: AnaMine partners with top Turkish heavy rubber manufacturers to import custom steel-reinforced conveyor systems, significantly reducing operation downtime in Luanda.
news.n2_title: AnaMine Opens Strategic Ferro Alloys Sourcing Corridors
news.n2_desc: Expanding our metallurgical portfolio to provide high-purity alloy blends, supporting structural construction projects across Angola's industrial zones.
news.n3_title: Lean Shipping: Reducing Luanda Port Turnaround by 18%
news.n3_desc: By implementing Six Sigma lean warehousing at our local Talatona depot, customs clearing and delivery of spare parts have set record speeds.
news.n4_title: Manganese Smelting & The Turkish Metallurgical Network
news.n4_desc: A comprehensive trade update highlighting how Turkish alloy smelters utilize high-grade manganese shipments from Angolan extractors to supply structural constructors in Europe.
news.n5_title: Conveyor Belt Durability: A Sourcing Case Study
news.n5_desc: How on-site quality assurance audits at Turkey factories increased conveyor wear resistance by 24% for heavy diamond excavation lines.

digital.title: AnaMine AI & Digital
digital.desc: Predictive AI dashboards, automated inventory SaaS, secure blockchain ledgers, and bespoke enterprise systems for industrial operations.

home.hero_title: Digital Systems for Industrial Operations & Global Sourcing
home.hero_desc: We convert manual, chaotic supply chains into predictable, high-margin operations. We develop bespoke cloud systems, predictive ML engines, and hyperledger traceability ledgers.
home.dashboard_desc: A real-time visual simulation of our custom ERP Dashboard. Review how inventory status, fleet diagnostics, and maritime logistics integrate into one central viewport.
home.arch_desc: Our cloud systems act as secure middleware, linking on-site operations to executive decision suites.
home.arch1_desc: Sync physical sensors installed on conveyor belt rollers, oil pipelines, and haul machinery directly into data middleware.
home.arch2_desc: Advanced RNN models process historical consumption rates, dynamically estimating critical material stockout risks.
home.arch3_desc: Seamless REST API sync channels with SAP, Oracle, or proprietary databases, verifying MRO operations.
home.core1_desc: Custom implementation of transactional frameworks and database links directly into enterprise core databases (SAP, Oracle, or customized backends).
home.core2_desc: Predictive inventory algorithms, automatic warehouse restocking calculators, and end-to-end expediting tracking software.
home.core3_desc: Automated electronic bidding systems, supplier contract repositories, and real-time vendor verification portals.
home.global_desc: We operate central technology engineering hubs in Turkey, crafting deep learning models, smart contract blockchain prototypes, and IoT middlewares tailored for African heavy operations.
home.cta_desc: Consult with our systems architecture team in Istanbul to modernize your inventory, integrate edge telemetry, or track shipments ethically.

about.title: About AI & Digital
about.intro: We develop custom cloud platforms and automated software systems that convert manual, chaotic supply chains into predictable, high-margin operations.
about.pillar1_desc: Deep assessment of your IT networks, identifying data gaps, mapping process bottlenecks, and formulating digital transformation strategies.
about.pillar2_desc: Custom machine learning models that analyze historical parts usage to predict future stockouts before they disrupt operations.
about.pillar3_desc: Decentralized ledgers that track mineral shipments and chemicals from origin to delivery, verifying ethical supply chains.
about.tech_dna_desc: Our Istanbul tech lab utilizes modern architectures, robust REST APIs, and strict DevSecOps pipelines. We leverage Agile methodologies to deploy custom ERP dashboard integrations, ensuring rapid releases with near-zero service disruptions.
about.agile_desc: We integrate predictive algorithms using recurrent neural networks (RNNs) that analyze parts usage historical trends, automatically recalculating warehouse reorder points and mitigating stockout risks by up to 30%.

services.title: Enterprise Softwares & Analytics
services.intro: Tailor-made cloud software and analytics pipelines designed to give enterprise executives complete operational clarity.
services.s1_desc: Comprehensive analysis of your digital systems to draft realistic roadmaps for software and cloud migration.
services.s2_desc: Implementation of clean, centralized supplier bid systems and customized ERP integrations (SAP, Oracle, or custom backends).
services.s3_desc: Real-time KPI visualization modules for fleet tracking, warehouse levels, and international shipment statuses.
services.s4_desc: Smart inventory engines that automatically recalculate reorder points, reducing dead stock while ensuring product availability.
services.s5_desc: Decentralized hyperledgers tracking mineral shipments from extraction sites to smelting ports, establishing immutable proof of ethical sourcing.
services.s6_desc: IoT middleware syncing remote thermal and vibration sensors on conveyor belts, feeding real-time telemetry directly into ERP dashboards.

news.n4_desc: An engineering paper detailing how our Istanbul development lab uses deep learning to model diamond mine spare depletion patterns in Talatona.
